title: Key Information and Network Security Events of December 2013
description: A chronological timeline of major cybersecurity incidents and vulnerabilities discovered in December 2013, highlighting significant threats and responses from that period.
elements: Adobe Breach Aftermath and Password Analysis
Bitcoin Exchange Input Validation Vulnerability (e.g., inputs of money)
Increased Focus on Point-of-Sale (POS) System Security
relationships: Sequential timeline showing how multiple high-profile security events occurred concurrently, raising public and professional awareness of major threats like large-scale retail breaches and ransomware.
